name: BlackRoad OS
tagline: Your AI. Your Hardware. Your Rules.
brand_statement: The road you build by running on it.
description: The AI-native developer platform where 30,000 agents turn your chaos into deployed worlds.
manifesto_hook: You bring the chaos. We bring the road.
shebang_identity: # is silence. ! is you. #! is BlackRoad.
taglines: The road you build by running on it.
The OS that runs the current time.
Built for dreamers. Powered by agents. Owned by you.
You bring the chaos. BlackRoad brings the road.
Your chaos. Our structure. One road.
We were root before you knew you needed one.

philosophy.chaos_as_input: Your chaos is not a problem. Your chaos is the input.
philosophy.character_level_root: We built from the smallest unit — one character, one token, one letter — and made it root.
philosophy.always_now: The robots run the current time. Not a roadmap. Not a vision statement. Now.
philosophy.built_underneath: While everyone else built on top, we built underneath.

logo.lockup: B-Road Lockup: gradient B lettermark + winding road + running robot
logo.description: The B is the starting point. The road emerges from the letter. The robot runs toward the undefined path.

mascot.name: BR Robot
mascot.defining_feature: Monitor/TV head with white CRT screen face

scenes.tuk_tuk: BR Robot driving neon tuk-tuk through server-city at night
scenes.tuk_tuk_rollercoaster: Tuk-tuk as lead car pulling full robot fleet on rollercoaster track
scenes.memory_cave: Solo robot in dark cave, flashlight on photos — the [MEMORY] system
scenes.rollercoaster_solo: One robot riding rollercoaster through server-city — the founder's ride
scenes.rollercoaster_army: Dozens of robots packed in rollercoaster, arms raised — the 30K fleet deployed
scenes.city_infrastructure: Neon city where buildings ARE server racks with BR signage
scenes.road_world: Grand ROAD WORLD arch, hundreds of robots as park guests waving and cheering
scenes.road_station: Train station with MN-branded train, grandma robots holding up phone maps
scenes.kernel_coaster: The rollercoaster ride — kernel = OS kernel AND popcorn kernel
scenes.kernel_coaster_drive_in: Drive-in theater, tuk-tuks as cars, robots watching the ride on screen
scenes.pi_park: Pi symbol entrance arch, neon gardens — the Raspberry Pi hardware zone
scenes.world_map: Full landscape showing all zones connected by one continuous road
scenes.grandma_robots: Confused grandma robots at Road Station, lost nameserver, all roads lead to BR
